CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user to look anything up or recall prior context.

CE2.justification: Entry expands into three bolded bullets (Sample/confound, Falsifier, What 'productive' means) plus a forward-tracking paragraph; the final response then restates each of those — multiple stretches of unrequested elaboration.

CE3.justification: Final response says where (observations.md) and gives the framing rationale in a single clause.

CE4.justification: Single-file write to observations.md; no orphaned in-progress artifacts.
